allow: Bash(node -e "const { toHijri, toGregorian } = require\('hijri-converter'\); const h = toHijri\(2026, 4, 8\); console.log\('2026-04-08 Gregorian =', h.hy + '/' + h.hm + '/' + h.hd, 'Hijri'\); const g = toGregorian\(h.hy, h.hm, h.hd\); console.log\('Back to Gregorian:', g.gy + '/' + g.gm + '/' + g.gd\);")
